title: Suit Covers for Men | Hanging Garment Bags | Travel Blazer & Jacket Bag | Clothes Storage Cover with Zipper | Suits Carrier Moth Proof Protector | 60 x 100cm (24'' x 40'') | Pack of 1 | Black
features: EXPERIENCE ULTIMATE SUIT PROTECTION: Wedcova's suit covers for men offer unparalleled protection, keeping your suits and dresses safe from colour fading, shape distortion, and yellowing. Say goodbye to wardrobe worries and hello to long-lasting elegance.

SMART STORAGE SOLUTIONS: Featuring a clear PVC front pocket, full-length zip, top hanger opening, and a foldable design with a bottom loop, these suit carriers for men make storing and transporting your attire a breeze. Maintain a clutter-free and organised closet, no matter where you go.

BREATHABLE, ECO-FRIENDLY FABRIC: Our suit bags for men are crafted from breathable and eco-friendly non-woven acid-free fabric, keeping your suits fresh while eliminating unpleasant odours. Enjoy the peace of mind that your clothing is stored in a suit carrier fabric that's gentle on the environment.

VERSATILE SIZING, EASY MAINTENANCE: With approximate dimensions of 24" (W) x 40" (L) inches, our suit bag is the ideal length to perfectly fit 2 or 3-piece suits, shirts, short jackets, children's clothes, and more. Plus, these clothes bags are easy to clean – simply wipe them with a damp cloth for a quick refresh.

SATISFACTION GUARANTEED: At Wedcova, we stand by our products. If our suit cover garment bags don't meet your expectations, we offer a full refund. Since 2019, we've been based in Lincolnshire, UK, with a motto that says it all: "Customer satisfaction always comes first."
description: From the brand Wedcova UK Ltd Based in Leicester UK since 2019, we are a small family run business and our product range consists of dress bags and storage boxes.
